## Constitutional Alignment

<!-- This is the most important section. How does this change affect Janet's constitutional guarantees? -->

- [ ] This change does not bypass or weaken consent gates
- [ ] This change does not introduce silent background behavior
- [ ] This change does not auto-expand Janet to new systems or networks
- [ ] This change does not log or persist sensitive data without explicit approval
- [ ] This change does not remove or dilute the Red Thread protocol
- [ ] This change does not treat tone, emotion, or inference as authoritative truth
- [ ] This change does not optimize for engagement, persuasion, or "stickiness"
- [ ] This change strengthens or preserves constitutional guarantees
